task: Rotate the steering wheel 90 degrees counterclockwise
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A black steering wheel is on a patterned surface. It has a central hub and two spokes. The task is to rotate it 90 degrees counterclockwise. STRATEGY - First, grasp the steering wheel at its central hub for stability. Then, rotate the entire wheel 90 degrees counterclockwise around its axis. Failure modes include slipping during rotation or incorrect angle. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the hub for a stable grasp; Step 2 grasp the hub; Step 3 rotate the wheel 90 degrees counterclockwise.**
Goal: rotated(steering_wheel, 90, counterclockwise)
Scene: steering_wheel
Step 1: reach(steering_wheel)
  affordance_region: the central hub of the steering wheel
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, steering_wheel, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, steering_wheel) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(steering_wheel)
  affordance_region: the central hub of the steering_wheel
  contact: holding(steering_wheel) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(steering_wheel)
Step 3: rotate(steering_wheel, 90, counterclockwise)
  affordance_region: the central hub of the steering_wheel
  contact: holding(steering_wheel) [progress]
  spatial: angle(steering_wheel, original_angle, 90, counterclockwise) [completion]
  direction: rotate_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: angle(steering_wheel, original_angle, 90, counterclockwise)
<END_OF_PLAN>
